locations.name: 危地马拉
locations.summary: 瓜地馬拉共和國（西班牙語：República de Guatemala），通稱瓜地馬拉（Guatemala），是中美洲北部的一個國家。該國地理位置優越，北接墨西哥，東北鄰伯利茲，東南與洪都拉斯和薩爾瓦多接壤，西瀕太平洋，東臨加勒比海的洪都…

locations.name: 墨西哥
locations.summary: 墨西哥合众国（西班牙語：Estados Unidos Mexicanos），通稱墨西哥（西班牙語：México），是北美洲南部的一个主权国家，北接美国，西濱太平洋，南鄰伯利兹、危地马拉，东面墨西哥湾。其领土面积达近198万平方公里，为美洲…

locations.name: 恰帕斯州
locations.summary: 恰帕斯州（西班牙語：Chiapas），正式名称为恰帕斯自由和主权州（Estado Libre y Soberano de Chiapas），是墨西哥的一個州，位於該國東南部。東臨瓜地馬拉，南臨太平洋。 整體屬熱帶濕潤氣候。北部靠近塔巴斯科…

locations.name: 萨尔瓦多
locations.summary: 薩爾瓦多共和國（西班牙語：República de El Salvador），通称萨尔瓦多（西班牙語：El Salvador），是位於中美洲北部的國家，為中美洲唯一不靠大西洋之國家，全國面积21,393平方公里。該國西北鄰接危地馬拉，東北…

relations.subject: Pink-headed warbler
relations.evidence: The pink-headed warbler (Cardellina versicolor) is a small passerine bird found in the southwestern highlands of Guatemala and the central and southeastern highlands of the Mexican state of Chiapas

relations.subject: Pink-headed warbler
relations.evidence: The pink-headed warbler is endemic to the highlands of central and eastern Chiapas in Mexico, and to western Guatemala. It is a fairly common to common resident of humid to semi-humid pine-oak, pine-evergreen and evergreen forest and edge, at altitudes ranging from above sea level. It prefers forest with dense, undisturbed understory, but is also found in disturbed forest with damaged understory in its strongholds in Guatemala; this is thought to be suboptimal habitat. Though it is among the species expected to occur in El Salvador, it has not yet been reported there
